DekisugiConfig.OriginalDns: dns: enable: true ipv6: false listen: 0.0.0.0:1053 fake-ip-range: 198.18.0.0/16 enhanced-mode: fake-ip fake-ip-filter: - "+.lan" - "+.local" - "geosite:cn" - "geosite:private" proxy-server-nameserver: - https://223.5.5.5/dns-query#🌐 本机·本地直连 - https://1.12.12.12/dns-query#🌐 本机·本地直连 nameserver-policy: "geosite:cn,private": - https://223.5.5.5/dns-query#🌐 本机·本地直连 - https://1.12.12.12/dns-query#🌐 本机·本地直连 nameserver: - https://8.8.8.8/dns-query#DNS连接 - https://1.1.1.1/dns-query#DNS连接 direct-nameserver: - 223.5.5.5 - 1.12.12.12
DekisugiConfig.OriginalUi: mixed-port: 7890 redir-port: 7891 tproxy-port: 1536 external-controller: 0.0.0.0:9090 external-ui-url: "https://github.com/Zephyruso/zashboard/releases/latest/download/dist.zip" external-ui: "./Web/Zash/" secret: ""
